data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the acceptance workflow for substitutes, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow, there is no concrete evidence of API interactions or state checks that demonstrate this capability. The absence of any evidence indicating that substitutes can accept or decline assignments leads to a conclusion of a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow for substitutes to accept or decline assignments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add acceptance workflow validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that substitutes can accept or decline assignments through the API.
